summary: End-to-end validation of the new JSON-driven rule engine on the Marketing Request state machine (guards + required_fields). All 7 scenarios in the review request passed. Backend rule engine + frontend builder UI + Marketing Request detail page enforcement (disabled action button with tooltip, dynamic required-field dialog, applies_when filtering) all behave correctly. Regression on FileAsset thumbnail/download/delete still works. SM has been reverted to its clean default at the end of testing.
critical_code_review_comments: GuardCondition.value is typed Optional[Any]; numeric guards (count_gte/gte) coerce internally via _num so admin entering string '2' still works. Good.
applies_when for required_fields and guards both call applies_when() — list membership semantics are consistent. Good.

MarketingRequestDetail renders BOTH action-${key}-btn (disabled with title tooltip) when guards fail. The optional action-${key}-blocked variant is also defined for the secondary blocked-row UI. The review request's expectation ("button DISABLED with tooltip") is satisfied by the disabled button + title attribute path. No action needed.
Cleanup pattern works: setting guards=null and required_fields=[] via PUT correctly drops the rule from the persisted SM. Confirmed by re-GET.
test_credentials: Admin surya.yadavalli@nylaairwater.earth / test123 (tenant nyla-air-water). Login returns session_token; FE stores it in localStorage key 'token'.
seed_data_creation: Created 3 Marketing Requests for the test (Neck Tags w/ 0 refs, Neck Tags w/ 2 refs, Presentation w/ 2 refs). After testing the SM has been REVERTED to clean state (guards=null, required_fields=[] on submitted→start_working). The 3 MRs themselves were not deleted but two of them have been advanced to 'In Progress' as part of validating the transition flow.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Rule engine is shipping clean. SM file/field catalog endpoint: GET /api/state-machines/fields/catalog?workflow_key=marketing_requests returns fields[] with operators per type and request_type_name.options resolved from master data (currently includes Neck Tags, Presentation, etc.). Frontend testids confirmed: transition-options-<idx>, add-guard-<idx>, guard-row-<idx>-<ci>, guard-field/op/value/message/applies-<idx>-<ci>, add-reqfield-<idx>, reqfield-label/key/type/options/applies-<idx>-<fi>, save-state-machine. On MarketingRequestDetail.js: action-<key>-btn is disabled with title='<block_reason>' when guards_ok=false; transition-fields-dialog with txn-field-<key> inputs and transition-fields-submit-btn for the required-field capture flow. applies_when correctly excludes non-Neck-Tags requests from the tags_quantity capture.
